approaches.title: Modify the Argument in a Loop
approaches.blurb: Modify the argument in a while-loop to determine the number of eggs.

approaches.title: Loop Without Modifying the Argument
approaches.blurb: Loop over the bits without modifying the argument to calculate the number of eggs.

approaches.title: Convert to a Binary String
approaches.blurb: Convert the argument to a binary string and count its ones to determine the number of eggs.

approaches.title: Use the Built-In Bit-Count Functionality
approaches.blurb: Use Python's built-in bit-count functionality to calculate the number of eggs.

approaches.title: Use Helper Functions
approaches.blurb: Split the problem into multiple helper functions to calculate the number of eggs.
